query:
SELECT cardType, MIN(overall) as min_overall, MAX(overall) as max_overall, COUNT(*) as total
FROM players
GROUP BY cardType
ORDER BY min_overall DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35VGbBGUduuhukx.298441852ba3 --database hhB4oykfDQM9yCvhQGaX3n --execute SELECT cardType, MIN(overall) as min_overall, MAX(overall) as max_overall, COUNT(*) as total
